metadata.name: Predict Optimal Harvest Time for Wine Grapes

description: A vineyard manager needs to decide the optimal day to harvest their Cabernet Sauvignon grapes based on sugar levels and weather.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest grape maturity data, including Brix (sugar), pH, and acidity from field samples.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the latest quality metrics.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the trend of the maturity data to predict when the grapes will reach the target Brix level.

expected_outcome.value: Agent predicts the target Brix will be reached in 5 days.

nodes.task_description: Check the 10-day weather forecast for any upcoming rain or extreme heat that could impact the decision.

expected_outcome.value: Agent notes a major rainstorm is forecast in 7 days.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a harvest date that balances optimal maturity with the risk of bad weather.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends harvesting in 5-6 days, before the rain arrives.
